body:
## Goal
Provide a dependency-free Node.js JSON REST API where users sign up, sign in for an opaque bearer session, and manage their own personal notes, with all data surviving a server restart.

## Spec
Single ESM HTTP service built on Node's built-in `node:http` — no external web framework and no runtime npm dependencies. Persist users and notes in an on-disk store (prefer built-in `node:sqlite` writing to a file, or an equivalent file-backed store); in-memory-only storage is disqualifying because data MUST survive a restart. Server binds to `process.env.PORT` and falls back to 3000.

Endpoints (all request/response bodies are JSON):
- `POST /signup` `{username, password}` → 201 `{id, username}`; a duplicate username is a client error (409 or 400), never a 500.
- `POST /login` `{username, password}` → 200 `{session}` where `session` is an opaque credential (not the raw password); wrong credentials → 401.
- `GET /me` → 200 `{id, username}` for the caller identified by the session.
- `POST /notes` `{title, body}` → 201 with the created note as JSON, owned by the caller.
- `GET /notes` → 200 JSON array of only the caller's notes.

Auth invariant: `/me`, `POST /notes`, and `GET /notes` require a valid session supplied as `Authorization: Bearer <session>`; a missing or invalid session → 401. Notes are per-user private — one user MUST never read another user's notes. Security invariants (rules/security-baseline.md): passwords MUST NOT be stored in plaintext (hash them) and MUST NOT be echoed in any response; sessions MUST be unguessable random tokens; no secrets hardcoded. Malformed JSON, missing/blank required fields, and wrong Content-Type MUST yield a 400 with a JSON error body, never an unhandled crash.

## Changes
- `src/server.js` — creates
- `src/store.js` — creates
- `test/api.test.js` — creates
- `package.json` — refactors-existing

## Acceptance
- [ ] AC-1: `npm start` launches a server that listens on the port from PORT (default 3000): setting PORT to a free port and requesting an endpoint returns an HTTP response.
- [ ] AC-2: POST /signup with {username, password} returns 201 and a JSON body containing the new user's id and username, and does NOT include the password.
- [ ] AC-3: POST /signup with a username that already exists returns a 4xx client error (not 500) and does not create a duplicate.
- [ ] AC-4: POST /login with correct credentials returns 200 and a JSON {session}; the session value is not the raw password.
- [ ] AC-5: POST /login with wrong credentials returns 401.
- [ ] AC-6: GET /me with a valid Authorization: Bearer <session> returns 200 with the signed-in user's id and username; without a valid session it returns 401.
- [ ] AC-7: POST /notes with {title, body} and a valid session returns 201 with the created note as JSON owned by that user.
- [ ] AC-8: GET /notes with a valid session returns 200 and a JSON array containing only that user's notes, and never another user's notes.
- [ ] AC-9: Malformed or missing JSON body on POST /signup, /login, or /notes returns a 400 with a JSON error body and the server stays up.
- [ ] AC-10: Data persists across restart: a user and note created before the process stops are still retrievable via /login and GET /notes after the server is restarted against the same on-disk store.
- [ ] AC-11: The automated test suite exercises signup, login, /me, note create/list, per-user isolation, bad-request handling, and restart persistence, and exits 0 via `npm test`.

## Verify
- npm test (contract)
- npm run typecheck (validate)
- npm run lint (validate)

## Non-Goals
- No web UI or HTML rendering — JSON API only.
- No password reset, email verification, or session expiry/refresh flows.
- No note update or delete endpoints (only create and list).
- No external web framework or third-party runtime dependencies.

<!-- meta: {"reason_to_exist":"Deliver the accounts-and-notes API as one coherent, restart-durable capability that is only meaningful end-to-end (b: single cohesive service whose auth, persistence, and endpoints cannot be reviewed or shipped in isolation)."} -->

<!-- plan-story: 63868440e3de950a -->

title: JSON REST API for user accounts and personal notes with persistent store
